sections.name: quality pipeline (`pyqual.yaml`)
sections.content:
```yaml markpact:pyqual path=pyqual.yaml
pipeline:
  name: redeploy-quality

  metrics:
    cc_max: 15
    critical_max: 80

  stages:
    - name: analyze
      tool: code2llm-filtered

    - name: validate
      tool: vallm-filtered

    - name: prefact
      tool: prefact
      optional: true
      when: any_stage_fail
      timeout: 900

    - name: test
      tool: pytest
      timeout: 600

  loop:
    max_iterations: 3
    on_fail: report
    ticket_backends:
      - markdown

  env:
    LLM_MODEL: openrouter/qwen/qwen3-coder-next
```
